title: verify-full output
description: stdout JSON produced by `tinfoil-conformance verify-full` per Tinfoil SPEC §11.

sigstore_measurement.description: Measurement extracted from the Sigstore-attested predicate (SPEC §5.5).

attestation_measurement.description: Measurement extracted from the hardware attestation report (SPEC §3.8 or §4 step 6).

matched_hardware.description: Matched entry from hardware_measurements when MP→TDX reduction was performed (SPEC §6.3).

final_measurement_fingerprint_hex.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the accepted measurement per SPEC §7.2.

code.description: SPEC-anchored rejection code from whichever sub-stage failed. Union of all upstream rejection codes plus a few cross-stage ones.

stage.description: Which sub-stage produced the rejection. 'verify-full' = a cross-stage assertion (e.g. final fingerprint mismatch).
